sections.title: Administration & Office Management
open: Tell us about your experience in office administration.
What are the main duties of an Admin Officer?
How do you manage daily office operations?
How do you prioritize office tasks?
How do you maintain office discipline?
How do you handle confidential office documents?
How do you manage office files and records?
How do you organize physical files properly?
How do you organize digital office records?
How do you ensure documents are not misplaced?
How do you maintain office supplies?
How do you track office inventory?
How do you manage stationery requirements?
How do you handle office maintenance issues?
How do you manage cleaning and housekeeping staff?
How do you coordinate with security staff?
How do you manage office visitors?
How do you handle visitor records?
How do you manage incoming and outgoing mail?
How do you maintain dispatch records?
How do you handle official correspondence?
How do you draft office letters?
How do you draft professional emails?
How do you manage meeting arrangements?
How do you prepare meeting minutes?
How do you follow up on meeting decisions?
How do you manage staff attendance records?
How do you verify attendance data?
How do you manage office timing discipline?
How do you handle late-coming staff records?
How do you manage official travel arrangements?
How do you handle accommodation arrangements for guests?
How do you coordinate with vendors?
How do you verify vendor bills?
How do you manage petty cash records?
How do you maintain office expense records?
How do you prepare administrative reports?
How do you ensure work is completed on time?
What administrative improvement would you suggest?
Why should we hire you as an Admin Officer?

sections.title: Practical Scenarios & Problem Solving
open: What would you do if an important file goes missing?
What would you do if two urgent tasks are assigned at the same time?
How would you handle a rude visitor?
How would you handle an employee who refuses to follow office rules?
What would you do if office equipment suddenly stops working?
How would you manage a meeting room conflict?
What would you do if a vendor delays urgent work?
How would you handle a complaint from senior management?
What would you do if an official letter contains an error?
How would you handle missing attendance entries?
What would you do if office supplies finish unexpectedly?
How would you handle a security-related issue?
What would you do if a guest arrives without approval?
How would you manage a sudden inspection visit?
What would you do if staff are not maintaining discipline?
How would you handle repeated complaints about cleanliness?
What would you do if a department does not submit required data?
How would you follow up without sounding rude?
What would you do if a vendor bill looks incorrect?
How would you handle urgent repair work?
What would you do if management asks for an old record urgently?
How would you manage work during internet failure?
What would you do if a printer fails before an important meeting?
How would you handle duplicate records?
What would you do if office staff blame each other for a mistake?
How would you handle pressure from multiple departments?
What would you do if you notice misuse of office supplies?
How would you handle confidential information leakage?
What would you do if an employee argues about attendance?
How would you manage last-minute arrangements for guests?
What would you do if a report deadline is missed?
How would you correct wrong data in official records?
What would you do if a senior gives unclear instructions?
How would you handle a complaint about office transport?
What would you do if files are not properly indexed?
How would you manage workload during staff shortage?
What would you do if a visitor refuses to provide ID?
How would you handle emergency office closure?
What would you do if office rules are outdated?
Describe a time you solved an administrative problem.

o: assess urgency and impact before deciding priority

o: ignore the issue because it is difficult
